reports.description: STTM public Ex Ante Market Price report. Contains ex ante market price at STTM hubs for a gas day and is issued after approval of an ex ante market schedule.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date, for example 30 Jun 2009.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule that the ex ante market price relates to, except where administered_price_period is Y.

source_columns.name: ex_ante_market_price
source_columns.description: The ex ante market price for the gas date. This is either the market price determined by the scheduling and pricing engine or the administered price during an administered price period.

source_columns.name: administered_price_period
source_columns.description: Whether the gas date falls within an administered price period. Valid values are Y and N. This is not Y when an administered state is determined after the ex ante schedule is published.

source_columns.name: cap_applied
source_columns.description: If the gas date is within an administered price period, whether the administered price was capped. Valid values are Y and N.

source_columns.name: administered_price_cap
source_columns.description: If an administered price was capped, the Administered Price Cap value. If the administered price was not capped, this field is null.

source_columns.name: schedule_price
source_columns.description: If the administered price was capped at the Administered Price Cap, the market schedule price derived from bids and offers before the cap was applied. Otherwise null.

source_columns.name: approval_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time when the schedule that the ex ante market price relates to was approved.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Ex Ante Schedule Quantity report. Contains the total ex ante market schedule quantity for each STTM facility for a gas day.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule from which the schedule quantity is produced.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the facility.

source_columns.name: scheduled_qty
source_columns.description: The total scheduled quantity for the facility. If the facility is of type network, this excludes the total price taker bid quantity.

source_columns.name: firm_gas_scheduled_qty
source_columns.description: The total firm gas scheduled in the ex ante market on the pipeline for the gas day, i.e. total ex ante scheduled quantities of all Trading Rights associated with priority 1 Registered Services. This field is null for a facility of type network.

source_columns.name: as_available_scheduled_qty
source_columns.description: The total as available gas scheduled in the ex ante market on the pipeline for the gas day, i.e. total ex ante scheduled quantities of all Trading Rights associated with Registered Services of priority other than 1. This field is null for a facility of type network.

source_columns.name: flow_direction
source_columns.description: Whether the scheduled quantity is for supply to the hub or withdrawal from the hub. Valid values are T and F.

source_columns.name: price_taker_bid_qty
source_columns.description: The total scheduled price taker bid quantity for the facility. This field is null if the facility is of a type other than network.

source_columns.name: price_taker_bid_not_sched_qty
source_columns.description: The price taker bid quantity not scheduled. This field is null if the facility is of a type other than network.

source_columns.name: approval_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the schedule was approved.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Ex Ante Pipeline Data report. Contains ex ante capacity price, flow constraint price, capacity quantity, facility hub capacity data quality, and the timestamp the hub capacity data was received for each facility of type pipeline.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The relevant gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule from which the prices were produced.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the facility.

source_columns.name: capacity_qty
source_columns.description: The total pipeline capacity quantity (GJ) that is available to the STTM, and the quantity used by AEMO to run the last approved ex ante market schedule for the relevant gas date.

source_columns.name: capacity_qty_quality_type
source_columns.description: Flag indicating whether the submitted capacity quantity is valid, warning, confirmed warning, or registered default capacity. Valid values are V, WH, WL, CH, CL, and D.

source_columns.name: capacity_qty_datetime
source_columns.description: Date and time the capacity quantity was received. This field is null if no capacity data was received and registered default capacity is applied.

source_columns.name: ex_ante_capacity_price
source_columns.description: The capacity price of the pipeline for the gas date. This price is either the capacity price determined by the scheduling and pricing engine or the administered price during an administered price period.

source_columns.name: ex_ante_flow_direction_constraint_price
source_columns.description: The pipeline flow direction constraint price of the pipeline determined in the relevant market schedule. Pipeline flow direction constraint price is not capped during an administered cap price state.

source_columns.name: schedule_capacity_price
source_columns.description: If the capacity price was capped at APC, the capacity price derived from bids and offers before the cap was applied. If the capacity price was not capped, this field is null.

source_columns.name: approval_datetime
source_columns.description: Date and time the schedule was approved.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: Date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Provisional Market Price report. Contains provisional prices for D-3 and D-2 for all STTM hubs.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub which the price relates to.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub which the price relates to.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule which the price relates to.

source_columns.name: provisional_price
source_columns.description: The provisional price.

source_columns.name: provisional_schedule_type
source_columns.description: The type of the provisional schedule. Valid values are D-2 and D-3.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Provisional Schedule Quantity report. Contains the total provisional schedule quantity for each STTM facility for D-2 and D-3.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule from which the schedule quantity is produced.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the facility.

source_columns.name: provisional_qty
source_columns.description: The provisional quantity for the facility. If the facility is of type network, this excludes the total provisional price taker bid quantity.

source_columns.name: provisional_firm_gas_scheduled
source_columns.description: The total provisional firm gas quantity on the pipeline for the gas day, i.e. total provisional scheduled quantities of all Trading Rights associated with priority 1 Registered Services. This field is null if the facility is of type network.

source_columns.name: provisional_as_available_scheduled
source_columns.description: The total provisional as available gas quantity on the pipeline for the gas day, i.e. total provisional scheduled quantities of all Trading Rights associated with Registered Services of priority other than 1. This field is null if the facility is of type network.

source_columns.name: flow_direction
source_columns.description: Whether the forecast quantity is for supply to the hub or withdrawal from the hub. Valid values are T and F.

source_columns.name: price_taker_bid_provisional_not_sched_qty
source_columns.description: The price taker bid quantity not scheduled in the provisional schedule. This field is null if the facility is of a type other than network.

source_columns.name: price_taker_bid_provisional_qty
source_columns.description: The total provisional price taker bid quantity for the facility. This field is null if the facility is of a type other than network.

source_columns.name: provisional_schedule_type
source_columns.description: The type of the provisional schedule. Valid values are D-2 and D-3.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Provisional Pipeline Data report. Contains provisional capacity price, provisional flow constraint price, provisional capacity quantity, and facility hub capacity data quality for each facility of type pipeline for D-2 and D-3.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule from which the provisional prices were produced.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the facility.

source_columns.name: provisional_capacity_qty
source_columns.description: The provisional pipeline capacity quantity (GJ) that is available to the STTM, and the quantity used by AEMO to run the provisional schedule for the relevant gas date.

source_columns.name: prov_cap_qty_quality_type
source_columns.description: Flag indicating whether the submitted capacity quantity is valid, warning, confirmed warning, or registered default capacity. Valid values are V, WH, WL, CH, CL, and D.

source_columns.name: provisional_capacity_price
source_columns.description: The provisional capacity price of the pipeline determined in the relevant provisional schedule.

source_columns.name: provisional_flow_constraint_price
source_columns.description: The provisional flow constraint price of the pipeline determined in the relevant provisional schedule.

source_columns.name: provisional_schedule_type
source_columns.description: The type of the provisional schedule. Valid values are D-2, D-3, and NA for non-schedule data.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Ex Post Market Data report. Contains ex post, provisional ex-post, and delayed ex-post details for the STTM hubs for a gas date.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule from which the imbalance price was produced.

source_columns.name: imbalance_qty
source_columns.description: The quantity of the bid/offer used to determine the imbalance price. If the quantity is negative or zero then the market was long and an offer has been placed. If the quantity is positive then the market was short and a bid has been placed.

source_columns.name: ex_post_imbalance_price
source_columns.description: The ex post imbalance price or provisional ex post imbalance price at the hub for the gas date. This price is either the ex post price determined by the scheduling and pricing engine or the administered ex post price during an administered price period. If a provisional ex post imbalance price is published, then a delayed ex post price will be published later in the gas day as per the STTM rules and procedures.

source_columns.name: schedule_type_code
source_columns.description: XPOST - ex-post/delayed ex-post price. PPOST - provisional ex-post price.

source_columns.name: imbalance_type
source_columns.description: Indicates whether the market was long (L) or short (S). If the market was short then a bid has been placed for the imbalance quantity. If the market was long then an offer has been placed.

source_columns.name: schedule_imbalance_price
source_columns.description: If the ex post imbalance price was subject to the APC, irrespective of whether the APC was breached, this field contains the ex post price derived from bids and offers regardless of the cap. If the ex post imbalance price was not subject to the cap, this field is null.

source_columns.name: approval_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the schedule was approved.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Latest Allocation Quantity report. Contains the total allocation quantity for each STTM facility.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the relevant facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the relevant facility.

source_columns.name: allocation_qty_inc_mos
source_columns.description: The total allocated quantity for the facility of deemed actual flow by direction, e.g. total allocated quantity to the hub or total allocated quantity from the hub. This quantity is inclusive of any MOS gas.

source_columns.name: flow_direction
source_columns.description: Whether the allocated quantity is for supply to the hub or withdrawal from the hub. Valid values are T and F.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was produced.

reports.description: STTM public Bid & Offer Report. Contains all bids and offers used in ex ante and D-2, D-3 provisional schedules for all STTM hubs. Price taker bids are not included.

source_columns.name: gas_date
source_columns.description: The gas date.

source_columns.name: company_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the company that submitted the bid/offer.

source_columns.name: company_name
source_columns.description: The name of the company that submitted the bid/offer.

source_columns.name: hub_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the hub.

source_columns.name: hub_name
source_columns.description: The name of the hub.

source_columns.name: schedule_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the schedule in which the bids/offers were used.

source_columns.name: facility_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the facility.

source_columns.name: facility_name
source_columns.description: The name of the facility.

source_columns.name: bid_offer_identifier
source_columns.description: The unique identifier of the bid or offer.

source_columns.name: bid_offer_step_number
source_columns.description: The number of the bid/offer step (1 - 10) on the bid/offer stack.

source_columns.name: step_price
source_columns.description: Dollar price per GJ for bid/offer.

source_columns.name: step_capped_cumulative_qty
source_columns.description: Cumulative quantity for the relevant bid or offer step submitted to the schedule. If the capacity of the Trading Right corresponding to the bid/offer is lowered after bid/offer submission and is lower than the submitted cumulative quantity, then the bid/offer quantity is capped at the capacity of the Trading Right. For bids, this is less any price taker bid quantity associated with the Trading Right.

source_columns.name: bid_offer_type
source_columns.description: Whether this is an offer (O) to supply gas to the hub or a bid (B) to flow gas from the hub for consumption at the hub or flow away from the hub. Valid values are B and O.

source_columns.name: report_datetime
source_columns.description: The date and time the report was generated.

landing_only_gaps.reason: Present in the live NEMWeb STTM root but absent from STTM Reports Specifications v19.1, so discovery lands root CSV files without generating a source-table bronze asset.
Present in the live NEMWeb STTM root but absent from STTM Reports Specifications v19.1, so discovery lands root CSV files without generating a source-table bronze asset.
